key_components: System prompt templates for short_video, long_video, blog_post

patterns_discovered.name: Async/Await Pattern
patterns_discovered.usage: All API calls use async methods (generate, generate_stream) for non-blocking I/O
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables concurrent request handling in async applications

patterns_discovered.name: Template Pattern
patterns_discovered.usage: CONTENT_TEMPLATES dict provides specialized system prompts for different content types
patterns_discovered.benefit: Centralizes prompt management and allows easy content type configuration

patterns_discovered.name: Error Handling Strategy
patterns_discovered.usage: Explicit handling of RateLimitError and APIError with logging
patterns_discovered.benefit: Distinguishes recoverable rate limits from fatal API errors

patterns_discovered.name: Configuration Resolution
patterns_discovered.usage: Constructor accepts optional api_key and model parameters, with fallback to settings
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible configuration supporting both injection and environment variables

patterns_discovered.name: AsyncIterator Streaming
patterns_discovered.usage: generate_stream yields content chunks as they arrive from API
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables real-time streaming responses without buffering entire response

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Chat Completions API vs Responses API
gotchas_discovered.detail: Subtask explicitly specified Chat Completions API, not the newer Responses API
gotchas_discovered.implication: Different message format, streaming behavior, and response structure than newer API versions

gotchas_discovered.detail: Missing OPENAI_API_KEY raises ValueError immediately on instantiation
gotchas_discovered.implication: Errors caught early but may break lazy initialization patterns; no graceful degradation

gotchas_discovered.detail: stream=True must be explicitly set; omitting it would return full response at once
gotchas_discovered.implication: Different code paths required for streaming vs non-streaming; easy to miss if refactoring

gotchas_discovered.detail: get_system_prompt() defaults to 'short_video' for unknown content types
gotchas_discovered.implication: Silent fallback could mask configuration errors; consider raising KeyError instead

completed_requirements: System prompts with Portuguese language support
approach_outcome.implementation_quality: High - Clean separation of concerns, proper async patterns, comprehensive error handling

recommendations.recommendation: Add exponential backoff retry logic for RateLimitError before raising to caller
recommendations.rationale: Improves resilience without adding complexity to consumer code

recommendations.recommendation: Cache CONTENT_TEMPLATES at module level (already done) but consider lazy initialization of AsyncOpenAI client
recommendations.rationale: Avoids unnecessary client creation if provider instance is created but not used

recommendations.recommendation: Add docstrings to generate() and generate_stream() methods documenting parameters, return types, and exceptions
recommendations.rationale: Improves IDE autocomplete and API clarity for consumers

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding content_type parameter to generate methods to auto-select system prompt
recommendations.rationale: Reduces boilerplate for consumers if content type is known at call time

recommendations.recommendation: Change get_system_prompt() default behavior to raise KeyError for unknown content types instead of silent fallback
recommendations.rationale: Fails fast on configuration errors rather than silently defaulting to short_video
